title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss how their organizations have adopted AI coding tools at scale. Topics include workflow changes, productivity measurement, resource allocation across the SDLC, and practical advice for other engineering leaders.
